Setup Guide¶

Steps¶

python -m venv venv
venv\Scripts\activate
pip install -r ..\news247_news_capstone_project\requirements.txt
python ..\news247_news_capstone_project\manage.py migrate
python ..\news247_news_capstone_project\manage.py runserver

News 24/7
